Off Calendar Feb-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s DEMURRER to Plaintiff's second, eighth, ninth, eleventh, and twelfth causes of action.

Off calendar pending possible coordination or complex designation.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION'S VERIFIED APPLICATION BY EMILY ANN ROSE FOR APPROVAL TO APPEAR PRO HAC VICE.

The verified application of Emily Ann Rose to appear as counsel pro hac vice to defendant Lyft, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

The Court will sign the proposed order included with the application.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
